result.stdout:
Usage: Genyman [arguments] [options] [command]

Arguments:
  input         File to use for generation

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --update      Perform update for package

Commands:
  all           Auto executes all generators
  deploy        Deploys the generator
  doc           Shows documentation for the configuration file
  new           Generates a confiration file for a generator

Run 'Genyman [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Powered by Genyman (https://genyman.github.io/docs)

Run 'Genyman [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Auto executes all generators

Usage: all [options]

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --recursive   Scan all folders and subfolders for Genyman configuration files

commands.payload:
Auto executes all generators

Usage: all [options]

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --recursive   Scan all folders and subfolders for Genyman configuration files

result.stdout:
Deploys the generator

Usage: deploy [options]

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --source      Deploys to custom nuget server
  --apikey      Use ApiKey to deploy to nuget server
  --major       Increase Major part of version
  --minor       Increase Minor part of version
  --build       Increase Build part of version (default)

commands.payload:
Deploys the generator

Usage: deploy [options]

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --source      Deploys to custom nuget server
  --apikey      Use ApiKey to deploy to nuget server
  --major       Increase Major part of version
  --minor       Increase Minor part of version
  --build       Increase Build part of version (default)

result.stdout:
Shows documentation for the configuration file

Usage: doc [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  packageId     Optionally specify a packageId to run the command for; if ommitted command is for Genyman generator

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --json        Output for json
  --source      Custom nuget server location for package
  --update      Perform update for package
  --md          Generates Markdown file for the given filename

result.stdout:
Generates a confiration file for a generator

Usage: new [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  packageId     Optionally specify a packageId to run the command for; if ommitted command is for Genyman generator

Options:
  --overwrite   Overwrite files if they exist
  --diagnostic  Output diagnostic logging
  --quiet       Do not Output any logging
  --help        Show help information
  --json        Output for json
  --source      Custom nuget server location for package
  --update      Perform update for package
  --file        Override filename for template (without extension)
